metadata.name: Docker Disk Usage Report
metadata.description: Generates a Docker disk usage report on target hosts and optionally sends a summary to Discord via webhook.
metadata.guide:
## Overview
This playbook gathers Docker disk usage details and can optionally post a summary to Discord.

## Prerequisites
- Provide the Discord webhook values before running if you want notifications.
- Confirm the report path is writable on the target hosts.

## Run
1. Render `main.yml` and review the report and notification settings.
2. Run the playbook against the target hosts.
3. Check the saved report or Discord message after the play completes.

## Docs
- [Docker System DF](https://docs.docker.com/reference/cli/docker/system/df/)

variables.name: include_verbose_report
variables.title: Verbose Report

variables.description: Send a short report to Discord webhook

variables.title: Discord Message Prefix
variables.description: Prefix line sent before report content

variables.description: Name to use for the report file.
